name: Payback Period Calculator
description: Free online payback period calculator. Enter initial investment and annual cash flow to get instant results.
seo_description: Use our free payback period calculator to quickly estimate payback based on investment, annual_cash. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculating payback period for $75,000 investment generating $18,500 annual cash flow.
result_context: The payback of {payback} years shows how long until the initial investment is recovered.
formula_display: Payback Period = Initial Investment ÷ Annual Cash Flow
steps: {'step': 1, 'description': 'Divide investment by annual cash flow', 'calculation': '$75,000 ÷ $18,500 = 4.05 years'}
{'step': 2, 'description': 'Interpret the result', 'calculation': 'Investment recovers in approximately 4 years and 2 weeks'}
mistakes: Not considering time value of money (use discounted payback instead)
Ignoring cash flows that occur after payback period
Using accounting profit instead of current cash flows
desc: Free online payback period calculator. Enter initial investment and annual cash flow to get instant results.
